overview: A professional B.Tech portfolio for Laxman Patel (Computer Science, SISTec GN Bhopal) featuring a prominent profile photo, skill progress bars, 5 sample B.Tech projects, a contact form, and a smooth dark/colorful theme toggle.
features: Profile photo displayed prominently in hero and about sections
Dark navy and vibrant colorful gradient theme with toggle
Skill progress bars for C, C++, Python, HTML, CSS
5 B.Tech sample project cards with detail pages
Contact form with validation and backend submission
Smooth scroll animations and section fade-ins
Sticky navigation with mobile hamburger menu
